allow: PowerShell(& "c:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root -e "CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_ventas; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_inventario; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_usuarios; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_catalogo; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_logistica; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_proveedores; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_promociones; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_facturacion; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_bodega; CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS bookpoint_sucursales; SHOW DATABASES;" 2>&1)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://maven.apache.org/download.cgi" -UseBasicParsing; $r.Content | Select-String "apache-maven-[\\d\\.]+-bin\\.zip" -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | Select-Object -First 5 Value)

PowerShell(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://archive.apache.org/dist/maven/maven-3/3.9.6/binaries/apache-maven-3.9.6-bin.zip" -OutFile "C:\\maven-download.zip" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Descarga OK - Tamaño: $\(\(Get-Item C:\\maven-download.zip\).Length\) bytes")

PowerShell($zip = "$env:TEMP\\maven-download.zip"; $dest = "C:\\Program Files\\Maven"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; Write-Host "Extraído en: $dest"; Get-ChildItem $dest | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell($zip = "$env:TEMP\\maven-download.zip"; $dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\maven"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dest | Out-Null; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $dest -Force; Write-Host "Extraído en: $dest"; Get-ChildItem $dest | Select-Object Name)
